item.title: An Evening With PinkPantheress
item.description:
Tuesday, April 14, 2026 at 8 PM

Location: WAMU Theater, 800 Occidental Ave S, Seattle, WA

No Resale Over Face Value: PinkPantheress is using Ticketmaster's Face Value Exchange to help fans get tickets at the original price. Tickets can only be resold on Ticketmaster at face value. This event offers standing-room-only access. Limited Accessible Seating on a first come first serve basis. All support acts are subject to change without notice. There is a six ticket limit. Anyone found purchasing above the set ticket limit may have partially or their entire refund cancelled. Please ensure your ticket is pulled up on your phone before arriving to the ticket scanning pedestal for an easy scanning experience. All pedestals are self-scan. There are no refunds or exchanges. There is no re-entry into the venue once exited. Please check WAMUTheater.com for any updated Health & Safety information and policies leading up to the performance date. Ticketmaster is the official ticketing source and partner of WAMU Theater.

Event details

item.title: Dancing With The Stars: Live! - 2026 Tour
item.description:
Wednesday, April 15, 2026 at 7:30 PM

Location: WAMU Theater, 800 Occidental Ave S, Seattle, WA

All support acts are subject to change without notice. There are no refunds or exchanges. There is no re-entry into the venue once exited. All patrons require a ticket, regardless of age. Including babies in arms. Lumen Field/WAMU Theater is not responsible for third party ticket purchases. There is a ticket limit of 8 tickets per person and per credit card on this event. VIP Ticket Limit is 4 per person and per credit card. Anyone found purchasing above the set ticket limit may have partially or their entire refund cancelled. WAMU Theater has a clear bag policy, please see our website for specific information. All support acts are subject to change without notice. There are no refunds or exchanges. There is no re-entry into the venue once exited. All patrons require a ticket, regardless of age. Including babies in arms. Lumen Field/WAMU Theater is not responsible for third party ticket purchases. There is a ticket limit of 8 tickets per person and per credit card on this event. VIP Ticket Limit is 4 per person and per credit card. Anyone found purchasing above the set ticket limit may have partially or their entire refund cancelled. WAMU Theater has a clear bag policy, please see our website for specific information.

Event details

Location: WAMU Theater, 800 Occidental Ave S, Seattle, WA

All support acts are subject to change without notice. There are no refunds or exchanges. There is no re-entry into the venue once exited. All patrons require a ticket, regardless of age. Ticketmaster is the official ticketing source and partner of WAMU Theater. Lumen Field/WAMU Theater is not responsible for third party ticket purchases. item.title: YUNGBLUD: IDOLS - THE WORLD TOUR
item.description:
Friday, May 15, 2026 at 8 PM

Location: WAMU Theater, 800 Occidental Ave S, Seattle, WA

This event offers standing-room-only access. Limited Accessible Seating on a first come first serve basis. All support acts are subject to change without notice. There is a four ticket limit for presale and six ticket limit for public onsale. Anyone found purchasing above the set ticket limit may have partially or their entire refund cancelled.
